bug_report.summary: Certificate Manager dialog default size/footprint increases after change (covers more of Preferences page)
steps_to_reproduce: Click “Manage Certificates…” / “View Certificates…” to open Certificate Manager.
expected_behaviors: Certificate Manager dialog opens at the standard/default size (v106-like), without unexpected expansion in width/height beyond what’s needed to keep the certificate list reasonable and the bottom action buttons visible.
actual_behaviors: Certificate Manager dialog opens with a noticeably larger overall footprint (wider/taller), covering more of the underlying Preferences page and altering overall spacing/layout compared to before.

false_positive_reasons: LLM hallucination — misinterpreted or imagined GUI rendering

bug_report.summary: Certificate Manager table/list region still expands too tall after change (across tabs), reducing space for bottom action buttons
steps_to_reproduce: Click “View Certificates…” (Manage Certificates…) to open Certificate Manager
Switch between tabs (e.g., Your Certificates → People → Servers → Authorities)
expected_behaviors: The certificate list/table area remains constrained to a reasonable height (v106-like)
Bottom action buttons and the OK button remain clearly visible with adequate separation from the table, without needing to scroll at default dialog size
actual_behaviors: The list/table area is taller after the change and occupies more of the dialog height across tabs
The bottom action buttons/OK button are positioned closer to the bottom edge with reduced whitespace/separation compared to before

false_positive_reasons: LLM hallucination — misinterpreted or imagined GUI rendering

bug_report.summary: Certificate Manager footer padding reduced after change; OK button too close to bottom edge/resize corner at small heights
steps_to_reproduce: Click “View Certificates…” to open the Certificate Manager dialog.
Resize the dialog to a short height (approx. 250–300px) by dragging the bottom edge upward.
Observe the spacing around the bottom action buttons and the OK button in the bottom-right.
expected_behaviors: Footer/action area retains normal padding similar to v106-like layout; OK button is not cramped against the bottom edge or resize corner.
actual_behaviors: Footer padding appears reduced after the change; the OK button sits very close to the dialog bottom edge/resize corner, making the footer look cramped and potentially harder to interact with precisely.

bug_report.summary: Page Info (Security tab) layout breaks after resizing: bottom Help button not anchored; Privacy & History values misaligned
steps_to_reproduce: Open Firefox with a fresh profile
Resize the Page Info window smaller in height (drag bottom edge/corner upward), then resize back larger
expected_behaviors: Resizing should reflow the Security tab content without introducing large unused blank areas.
Bottom-row controls (e.g., Help button) should remain aligned/anchored to the bottom of the dialog.
Security tab field/value layout (e.g., the ‘No’ values in Privacy & History) should remain consistently aligned and not shift unexpectedly.
actual_behaviors: After the code change, the Security tab shows a large empty area at the bottom and the Help button is positioned higher instead of staying at the bottom edge (bbox no. 5).
The ‘No’ values in the Privacy & History section appear shifted/misaligned compared to before (bboxes no. 2–4).
Overall dialog content region differs significantly after resizing (bbox no. 0), suggesting incorrect resize/layout behavior.

bug_report.summary: Page Info dialog collapses to title-bar-only height (content disappears) after interacting with the title bar
steps_to_reproduce: Switch to the Security tab (or leave default)
Right-click the Page Info window title bar (intended to open the window menu/resize options)
expected_behaviors: Right-clicking the title bar should open the window menu without changing the dialog size.
Page Info dialog content should remain visible and usable; the window should not collapse to an unusably small height.
actual_behaviors: In the after-change build, the Page Info window collapses to a very small height (appears to show only the title bar/tab strip), and the Security tab content is no longer visible (diff spans most of the window area; bbox no. 0).

bug_report.summary: Page Info dialog cannot be resized back to normal height; remains collapsed to tab strip only
steps_to_reproduce: Resize the Page Info window smaller in height
Attempt to resize it back larger by dragging the bottom edge downward
expected_behaviors: Dragging the bottom edge downward should increase the Page Info window height and restore visibility of the tab content (e.g., Security tab content).
actual_behaviors: After the code change, the Page Info window stays at a very small height (appears to show only the title bar/tab strip) and does not expand to show its content even after the resize-larger drag (diff spans most of the window area; bbox no. 0).

false_positive_reasons: GUI element location or interaction error (non-deterministic behavior)
